title: Is a glass of wine good for you? Doctor reveals the truth
summary: Love binge drinking? Doctor warns against consuming large amounts of alcohol in a short period, often during social gatherings or celebrations. | Health

title: India turns to AI in fight against glaucoma, boost early detection of disease
summary: AI tools can help analyse retinal images to detect signs of glaucoma, and warn people about impending health risks for related diseases, experts say.

title: Woman reveals developing osteoporosis a year after using Ozempic
summary: Avery, 30, revealed her shocking diagnosis of osteopenia and osteoporosis after using Ozempic for a year. She admitted to obtaining the medication wit

title: Reusing same toothbrush after a cold? Doctor warns it could be dangerous: Here's how to reduce reinfection risk
summary: According to a doctor, after suffering from a cold, it's time for a new toothbrush if you wish to maintain good oral health and prevent the spread of germs. | Health

title: Free flu vaccines to help WA community keep well during winter
summary: The Cook Government is encouraging Western Australians to get a free flu vaccination during May and June to protect themselves during the peak influenza period.

title: A risky jab and HIV threat put Kerala’s Valanchery in alert mode
summary: HIV outbreak in Kerala sparks fear and stigma among injecting drug users, prompting urgent response from health authorities.

title: Study identifies 17 modifiable risk factors shared between stroke, dementia, and depression
summary: Age-related brain diseases such as stroke, dementia, and late-life depression are a debilitating part of growing older, but people can lower their risk of these diseases through behavioral and lifestyle changes.

title: Study reveals complex patterns of substance use in U.S. adults
summary: A study from researchers at the University of Colorado Anschutz Medical Campus reveals that nearly one in five U.S. adults have used multiple drugs in the past year, showing that substance use is fairly common and more complex than just using one drug at a time.

title: Central team visits Narasaraopeta to probe death due to H5N1 virus
summary: Central team investigates H5N1 case in Narasaopeta, Palnadu district, recommends testing for antibodies among medical staff and patients.

title: Andhra Pradesh govt. notifies bird flu outbreak in six districts
summary: The Andhra Pradesh government on April 4, 2025 issued an order notifying outbreak of bird flu in the districts of West Godavari, East Godavari, Kurnool, Eluru, NTR and Kakinada as infected zones
